title: Smoked Salmon Hash with Crispy Shallots
description: A decadent and flavorful breakfast dish featuring smoked salmon, crispy shallots, and a crispy hash.
instructions: 2. In a large pan over medium heat, melt 1 tablespoon of butter.
3. Add the sliced shallots and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
4. Remove the shallots from the pan and set aside.
5. In the same pan, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
6. Add the hash browns and cook until crispy and golden brown, about 5-7 minutes.
7. Remove the hash browns from the pan and set aside with the shallots.
8. Add the smoked salmon fillets to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, until cooked through.
9. Serve the smoked salmon on top of the hash browns, topped with crispy shallots and a squeeze of lemon juice.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
